messages.content: Could you please clarify what you mean by '20x20'? Are you looking for a specific type of bike rack for a particular model of bike? Let me know so I can assist you better!
Could you please provide the exact model of your bike? This will help me find the right rear rack for you.
Could you please confirm the exact model name of your bike? This will help me find the appropriate rear rack for your needs.

Unfortunately, I don't have specific information on the AQ177 model's compatibility with rear racks. I recommend checking with our customer service team for the best options. You can reach them at (952) 283-0777 or via email at cs@rambobikes.com. They will be able to assist you further.
